title: Bridge Essay: Bodily self-perception during voluntary actions: The causal contribution of prem

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Physical De-solidification** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Body illusion — multisensory integration, rubber hand illusion, body ownership as constructed percept.

**Bodily self-perception during voluntary actions: The causal contribution of premotor cortex and cerebellum.**. Cortex.. PMID: 34166922. DOI: 10.1016/j.cortex.2021.05.012. Voluntary actions are accompanied by the experience of controlling one'sown movements (sense of agency) and the feeling that the moving body part belongs to one'sself (sense of body ownership). So far, agency and body ownership have been investigated separately, leaving the neural underpinnings of the relation between the two largely unexplored.
